use_cases: Display user profile pictures in web applications
Represent users in comments, reviews, or chat interfaces
Show team member avatars in collaboration tools
Provide user identification in dashboards and settings
Offer fallback initials when user photos are unavailable
ai_summary: A reusable Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with AvatarImage and AvatarFallback subcomponents. Features rounded-full design with proper aspect ratio handling and muted background fallback. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and supports custom className props for easy theming and integration.
